raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to get filesystem of /system, then df -m. Use df -m -B1? Actually df -m reports in MB. So: df -m -T /system | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'? But want available space. df -m /system gives columns: Filesystem, 1M-blocks, Used, Available, Use%, Mounted on. So print available: awk 'NR==2{print $4}'. So command: df -m /system | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'.

So command: df -m /system | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'.
